headline: NRG Energy Inc. (NRG): Billionaire David Tepper Registers Minor Adjustment to Position
summary: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) is one of Billionaire David Tepper’s 10 Small and Midcap Stock Picks with Huge Upside Potential. NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) first appeared in the 13F portfolio of Appaloosa Management LP back in the second quarter of 2017. This stake comprised 1.2 million shares. By the fourth quarter of 2017, the fund […]
